goals.text: Barbell back squat 95 lbs for 5 clean reps
milestones: Master front squat form at 65 lbs
goals.notes: Progression from goblet squat → front squat → back squat. Plantar fascia now resolved — ready to load axially.

goals.text: Complete 10 unbroken cable rows at 65 lbs
goals.notes: Upper back strength is a priority — she sits for long stretches between ICU shifts.

goals.text: No plantar fasciitis flare-ups for 3 consecutive months
goals.notes: She's been symptom-free since January — this goal formalizes the rehab success.

goals.text: Goblet squat 45 lbs for 3 sets of 8
goals.notes: Achieved ahead of schedule — form was excellent even with prior plantar fascia limitation.
